features: 【High Quality Materials】 The back scratch is made of stainless steel, which is not easily deformed and durable.

【Hand Shape Design】 The head has the shape of a hand design, without sharp edges, is smoother and does not violate the skin, which is conducive to the Itching of the back, and the actual Itching makes the handling more pleasant.
【Stretch Design】The back scratcher has a telescopic pole design, the longest can effectively relieve 50 cm / 19.6 inch.
【Multiple Use】 Suitable for head, back, legs, etc. and effectively help to solve itching problems and practical tools in everyday life.
【Quality Service】 If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us, we will do our best to solve the problem. If you are not satisfied with our products, we can refund or replace them.
description: Product description Back Scratcher, Telescopic Back Scratch, Back Scratcher, pullable from 15cm to 50cm, Stainless Steel Massager Tool for House, Trip and Office High quality materials The back scratch is made of stainless steel, which is not easily deformed and durable. Hand shape design and stretch design The back scratcher has a telescopic pole design, the head has the shape of a hand design. Multiple use Suitable for the head, back, legs, etc. and effectively help to solve itching problems and practical tools in everyday life. Small size, simply stowed away, can easily be carried on the go. Directions 1. Remove the back scratcher from its packaging. 2. Adjust the length of the back scratcher to suit your needs. 3. Use the hand shaped side to scratch the desired body area. Safety Warning Use with caution to avoid injury. Do not apply excessive pressure. Keep out of reach children. Consult a healthcare professional before use if you have any medical conditions or are pregnant. Ensure the massager is clean and dry storage. See more
